subcodes.first_line: This is the Book made known from the presence of the Self-Subsisting unto him who hath believed in God, the Mighty, the All-Loving. O people, answer ye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب معلوم من لدی القیوم الی الذی آمن بالله العزیز الودود یا قوم اجیبوا
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
